Libraries and Frameworks

A list of incredible libraries based on flexbox.

  • Bem gridstars137
  • Flexboxgridstars9.2k
  • Flex Grid Framework
  • Flexbox Grid for Stylus
  • Fuuxstars8 - Fuux is a Flexbox library that uses the same flexbox interface like classes.
  • Ginger Gridstars30 - A Flexbox grid framework named after a cute dog.
  • Bulma - A modern CSS framework based on Flexbox
  • Milligram - A minimalist CSS framework
  • RolleiFLEX - Just a responsive flexbox grid
  • Waffle Grid - An easy to use flexbox grid system

Featured Projects

Awesome projects about flexbox.

  • Cool examples of flexbox layout - A codepen a collection.
  • flex-boxstars2 - A Custom Element to make the basics of flexbox easier to use.
  • Flexbugsstars12.9k - A community-curated list of flexbox issues and cross-browser workarounds for them.
  • Flexbox Froggy - A game for learning CSS flexbox.
  • Flexbox Patterns - Examples and source code that will teach you how to build UI components with CSS flexbox! What’s flexbox?
  • Flexbox Defense - Tower Defense with a twist: all towers must be positioned with CSS Flexbox.
  • Flexbox tester - Understand how to calculate the width of flex items.
  • Flexbox layoutstars16.7k - FlexboxLayout is a library project which brings the similar capabilities of CSS Flexible Box Layout Module to Android.
  • FlexLayout for iOSstars1.4k - FlexLayout brings flexbox to iOS using Swift. Concise, intuitive & chainable syntax.
  • grid-styledstars2.1k - Flexbox based responsive ReactJS grid system built with styled-components
  • iron-flex-layout - Style mixins for cross-platform flex-box layouts
  • Post Apocalypse Flexboxstars29
  • React-flexboxstars163 - Implementation of css flexbox in react with inline styles.
  • Reflexboxstars1.4k - Responsive React flexbox grid system higher order component.
  • Solved by flexboxstars12.9k - A showcase of problems once hard or impossible to solve with CSS alone, now made trivially easy with Flexbox.
  • Visualizing Flexbox - A neat little CodePen Demo to play around with Flex properties.
  • ZEEF CSS Flexbox - The awesome flexbox on zeef.
  • Flexbox Zombies - A game for learning CSS flexbox.
